title: Performance Optimizations
description: A modpack you can drop into a world that improves performance and some visuals with zero gameplay changes
body:
# Performance Optimizations

I threw together a list of performance optimizing mods that are compatible, so you dont have to check every single mod.

The pack includes bugfixes and visual improvements aswell.

My aim is to make the experience of playing as good as possible, without making the gameplay distinguishible from vanilla.

This modpack is also available through packwiz at [susul-1312.github.io/minecraft-modpacks/performance-optimizations](https://susul-1312.github.io/minecraft-modpacks/performance-optimizations)
